div.h2: mydevice_init() — 5-Step Init with Goto Error Unwind
div.p: Each failed step jumps to a label that undoes all prior steps in exact reverse order.

Cleanup rule: Each label undoes exactly one step, then falls through to the label below, unwinding all prior steps in reverse order. Label chain: destroy_device → destroy_class → del_cdev → unreg_region → free_buf
Allocate-before-free invariant: In RESIZE: kzalloc new buffer FIRST, then kfree old buffer only on success. Here: if Step 1 fails, nothing was allocated — err_free_buf still calls kfree(NULL) safely.
